Name: Smooth Anti Gravity Humidifier
Description:
Upgrade your space with the stylish and futuristic Smooth Anti Gravity Humidifier. Designed to combine beauty, relaxation, and functionality, this premium humidifier creates a stunning visual effect of water droplets flowing upward using advanced LED strobe lighting.

This ultrasonic humidifier helps add moisture to the air, improving air quality and creating a more comfortable environment for your home, office, or bedroom. It also supports aromatherapy with essential oils.

Key Features:
✔ Unique Anti-Gravity Water Droplet Effect
✔ Ultrasonic Humidification Technology
✔ Supports Aromatherapy with Essential Oils
✔ Improves Air Moisture & Air Quality
✔ Built-in Digital LED Clock
✔ Large Water Tank Capacity

Name: M15 Game Stick
Description:
Bring back the golden era of gaming with the M15 Game Stick. This plug-and-play retro gaming console is designed for classic game lovers who want instant fun without complicated setup.

Packed with 20,000+ to 22,000+ pre-installed classic games, the M15 Game Stick supports multiple popular emulators including PS1, GB, GBA, and many more. Enjoy endless nostalgia with your favorite childhood games right on your TV.

Key Features:
✔ 20,000+ Built-in Classic Games
✔ Supports PS1, GB, GBA & Multiple Emulators
✔ HDMI Plug-and-Play Setup
✔ 4K Display Support
✔ 64GB SD Card Included
✔ 2.4G Wireless Game Controllers

Name: Magic Induction Line Follower Car
Description:
Make playtime smarter and more exciting with the Magic Induction Line Follower Car. This fun and educational toy is designed to entertain kids while boosting creativity and imagination.

Featuring Automatic Line Following Technology, simply draw a black line on paper and watch the car magically follow the path! It creates a unique interactive play experience that keeps children engaged for hours.

Key Features:
✔ Automatic Line Following Technology
✔ Cute Cartoon Car Design
✔ Bright Attractive Colors (Pink & Yellow)
✔ Battery Operated for Easy Use
✔ Safe & Kid-Friendly Material

Name: Little Monster Rock Crawler RC
Description:
Unleash the power of adventure with the Little Monster Rock Crawler RC. Built for speed, drifting, and off-road action, this powerful RC car is perfect for kids, hobby lovers, and remote-control car enthusiasts.

Designed with a strong Metal Body and Double Suspension System, it offers better durability, smooth movement, and stable performance on rough surfaces. Whether you're racing indoors or exploring outdoor tracks, this rock crawler delivers exciting drifting and off-roading fun.

Key Features:
✔ Powerful Single Remote Control
✔ Smooth Drifting Performance
✔ Strong Off-Roading Capability
✔ Realistic Light & Smoke Spray Effect
✔ Premium Durable Metal Body

Compatible with Android phones, iPhone, PC, and Mac, this versatile combo is perfect for office work, online classes, business use, gaming, and travel. Its compact design and mix color options add both style and convenience to your setup.

Name: Apple Watch Ultra - Premium Smartwatch with Bluetooth Calling & Fitness Tracking
Description:
Upgrade your style and smart lifestyle with the Apple Watch Ultra  – 7 in 1 Strap (49MM). Designed with a premium ultra look and powerful smart features, this watch is perfect for daily wear, fitness tracking, and business use.

This model comes with 7 interchangeable straps—change your style every day of the week! The box includes 7 straps, watch protector, wireless fast charging cable, and manual book for a complete premium package.

Built with backside real screws, secure strap locking system, ultra original wallpapers, and new watch faces, it gives the authentic luxury feel. The triple button design with working scroll ensures smooth operation and connectivity with all devices.

Enjoy Bluetooth calling with call making and answering directly from your wrist, along with powerful features like phonebook, call log, dialer, calculator, notifications, calendar, alarms, and more.

Key Features:

✔ Bluetooth Calling (Make & Answer Calls)
✔ Triple Button with Working Scroll

Equipped with the advanced H2 chip, Active Noise Cancellation (ANC), and Adaptive EQ, AirPods Pro 3 automatically optimize sound according to your ears for a truly personalized audio experience. Whether you're listening to music, taking calls, traveling, or working out, these earbuds provide smooth performance and all-day comfort.

With up to 8 hours of playtime, IP57 water resistance, and ultra-fast USB-C charging, they are built to keep up with your daily lifestyle. Stylish, lightweight, and powerful—your perfect audio companion for every moment.

Name: Apple Type-C / Lightning Wired EarPods
Description:
Experience crystal-clear sound and premium comfort with the Apple Type-C / Lightning Wired EarPods. Designed with superb quality and powerful audio output, these earphones deliver a rich listening experience just like original handsfree.

Unlike traditional round earbuds, the unique EarPods design is shaped according to ear geometry, making them more comfortable and secure for long-time use. The high-quality built-in speakers maximize sound output, giving you deep bass, clear vocals, and balanced sound for music, videos, and calls.

Available with both Type-C Connector and Lightning Connector, these earphones are perfect for modern smartphones and devices. It also features a built-in remote and microphone, allowing you to adjust volume, control music playback, and answer or end calls easily.

Key Features:
✔ Apple OG Style Premium Packing
✔ Superb Sound Quality with Deep Bass
✔ Comfortable Ergonomic EarPods Design
✔ Type-C / Lightning Connector Options
✔ Built-in Mic for Clear Calling
✔ Volume & Music Control Remote
✔ Smooth Calling, Music & Video Experience
✔ Same Like Original Handsfree Quality
